title: Rattan Serving Tray with Handles, 30x20cm Handwoven Rectangular Tray for Breakfast, Coffee, Tea Serving - Sturdy Decorative Display for Vanity, Bathroom, Kitchen & Home Decor Organiser ﻿
features: Versatile Use: This Serving Tray Rectangle Decorat is designed to serve a wide range of purposes, from a tea or beverage serving tray to a decorative tray for foot stools and item displays, making it a multifunctional addition to any space.

Stylish Design: Featuring a natural color palette, this wicker tray seamlessly blends with various decor styles and seasonal themes, enhancing the aesthetic appeal of any room, from kitchens to living areas.

Convenient Mobility: The side handles of this decorative tray ensure easy movement and transport, making it ideal for use in retail stores, hotels, or for creating organized display or storage areas in your home.

Durable Material: Crafted from high-quality imitation bamboo rattan, this rectangle tray is not only aesthetically pleasing but also sturdy and reliable for everyday use, ensuring it will last while keeping your items securely in place.

Satisfaction Guaranteed: We stand behind the quality of our wicker trays for display and are committed to customer satisfaction. Enjoy hassle-free after-sales service, ensuring your purchase is protected and your needs are met.
description: Product Description Exquisite weaving Made of traditional hand-woven, fine and firm, not easy to scratch the items Rounded handle handle design, easy to carry and feel more comfortable. High-quality materials Hand-woven with pp rattan-like rubber, flexible and easy to clean. Overall rounded The edge is rounded and delicate, with fine workmanship.
